title: ingest-okta-system-log-ocsf MCP parameters
description: Typed CLI parameters for Okta System Log JSON/JSONL to OCSF IAM ingestion.

input_path.description: Path to raw Okta System Log JSON or JSONL. Omit to read stdin via the input field.

output_path.description: Write OCSF JSONL to this path instead of stdout.
